description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the base/archlinux Docker image, set GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive, and define a single build stage with a job named build. In the build job, run before_script commands 'yes | pacman -Syyu || true' and 'yes | pacman -S pkg-config make cmake clang gtk3 gtkmm3 libpng libx11 curl gstreamermm glibmm || true', cache object files matching src/*.o, then execute 'cmake -G \"Unix Makefiles\" -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release' followed by 'make'. Publish the resulting files matching screens* and assets/screens.desktop as artifacts. No additional triggers or deployment targets are defined.
